mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_connections ( connection_id, demand_id, supply_id, demand_user_id, supply_user_id, status, start_date, last_update, completed_date, notes, applicant_user_id, applicant_company_name, applicant_contact_name, applicant_contact_phone, applicant_contact_email, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{connectionId}, #{demandId}, #{supplyId}, #{demandUserId}, #{supplyUserId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{lastUpdate}, #{completedDate}, #{notes}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantCompanyName}, #{applicantContactName}, #{applicantContactPhone}, #{applicantContactEmail}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id WHERE sc.id = #{id}

SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id WHERE sc.demand_id = #{demandId} ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC

SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id WHERE sc.supply_id = #{supplyId} ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC

SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id WHERE sc.applicant_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC

SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id WHERE sc.applicant_user_id = #{userId} OR d.user_id = #{userId} OR s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC

SELECT sc.id, sc.connection_id, sc.demand_id, sc.supply_id, sc.status, sc.start_date, sc.last_update, sc.completed_date, sc.notes, sc.applicant_user_id, sc.applicant_company_name, sc.applicant_contact_name, sc.applicant_contact_phone, sc.applicant_contact_email, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, d.title AS demand_title, d.type AS demand_type, d.category AS demand_category, d.company_name AS demand_company_name, d.status AS demand_status, d.user_id AS demand_user_id, s.title AS supply_title, s.type AS supply_type, s.category AS supply_category, s.company_name AS supply_company_name, s.status AS supply_status, s.user_id AS supply_user_id FROM supply_connections sc LEFT JOIN supply_demands d ON sc.demand_id = d.id LEFT JOIN supply_supplies s ON sc.supply_id = s.id ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
